title: integrations — model relationships
description: Single-entity module; only relation is Tenant -> TenantIntegration (1:N — one tenant can configure many integrations across different providers).

outbound.description: Applied via the BelongsToTenant trait. Unique(tenant_id, provider) at v0.3 — one instance per (tenant, provider).

inbound_expected.via: tenant_integration_id (planned: link a Stripe integration to a subscription)
provider_key (planned: audit which subprocessors a tenant has active)
